<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep the PR focused on one change.
For UI changes, attach a before/after screenshot.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 📚 Docs
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under a `[X.Y.Z]` section
- [ ] Service worker cache version bumped (`public/sw.js`) if assets changed
- [ ] i18n keys added/updated in all 4 languages (fr/en/de/nl) if user-facing strings touched
- [ ] Screenshots refreshed for affected page(s) — auto via post-commit hook if installed, or `node scripts/screenshots-changed.mjs "page.html"`
